title: So far, so good, says President of new Latvian government's first week
summary_full: Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs said on June 3rd he was happy with the initial signs from the new four-party coalition government headed by Andris Kulbergs (United List).
summary_public: Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs said on June 3rd he was happy with the initial signs from the new four-party coalition government headed by Andris Kulbergs (United List).

LV.label: positive
LV.evidence: happy with the initial signs from the new four-party coalition government
